mapper.select: SELECT ci.v_career_id , ci.v_career_nm , ci.d_start_dtm , ci.d_end_dtm , (EXTRACT(year FROM AGE(d_end_dtm, d_start_dtm)) * 12 + EXTRACT(month FROM AGE(d_end_dtm, d_start_dtm))) AS total_months FROM career_info ci WHERE ci.v_flag_del = 'N' ORDER BY ci.d_start_dtm
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO career_info ( v_career_id ,v_career_nm ,d_start_dtm ,d_end_dtm ,v_flag_del ) VALUES ( ('C'::text || generate_career_id()) , #{vCareerNm} , #{dStartDtm}::timestamp , #{dEndDtm}::timestamp , 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE career_info SET v_flag_del = 'Y' WHERE v_flag_del = 'N' AND v_career_id = #{vCareerId}
